parsed.name: cubrid-mysql-update-indexed
parsed.description: UPDATE by primary key on a 1K-row table. Measures indexed update throughput for CUBRID (pycubrid) vs MySQL (PyMySQL). Replicates cubrid-benchmark Tier 1: bench_update_1k_where_indexed.

queries: CREATE TABLE bench_update (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, amount INT NOT NULL)

steps.name: update-by-pk
steps.query: UPDATE bench_update SET amount = %(amount)s WHERE id = %(id)s
